aeo_readiness.summary: While the business has strong local SEO foundations, it lacks the necessary structured data and conversational content to be cited by AI assistants effectively.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with questions relevant to HVAC services.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Absence of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI models to cite the business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and troubleshooting tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section with questions about common HVAC issues and solutions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the go-to expert by creating detailed content on HVAC maintenance and repair.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for Answer Engine Optimization.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO, the business misses out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, FAQ content, and authority-building strategies to enhance AI visibility and drive more leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first three months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead.
